MODULE: cosmos.integration.solana.trading

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Solana Trading Core.

"Money is just data that the community has agreed is important."

CLASSES:
- SolanaTradingSkill

  Methods: async def pump_fun_trade(self, action: str, mint: str, amount: float, denominated_in_sol: bool=True)
  Methods: async def meteora_info(self, pair_address: str) -> Dict
